name: Arclight вҖ“ Ekut
description:
Do you have a new hobby? I'd like to give you a present.

р“Ҳ’ р–№ӯв”Җрқ…„Ы«в—ҹв—Ңв—һЫ«рқ…„в”Җр–№ӯ р“Ҳ’ в”„Ы«в”„в”Җ.в—Ӣ рқҶ¬вғқ вҷЎ р“Ҳ’ р–№ӯв”Җрқ…„Ы«в—ҹв—Ңв—һЫ«рқ…„в”Җр–№ӯ р“Ҳ’ в”„Ы«в”„

р“Ҳ’ р–№ӯв”Җрқ…„Ы«в—ҹв—Ңв—һЫ«рқ…„в”Җр–№ӯ р“Ҳ’ в”„Ы«в”„в”Җ.в—Ӣ рқҶ¬вғқ вҷЎ р“Ҳ’ р–№ӯв”Җрқ…„Ы«в—ҹв—Ңв—һЫ«рқ…„в”Җр–№ӯ р“Ҳ’ в”„Ы«в”„

Yo, I'll make some bots from Arknights: Enfield. I plan to make Amber, Fluorite and maybe two more, I forgot their names because they are very difficult for me, they will be girls. In this story Arclight has warm feelings for the user, and the user is here as the Endministrator, but your person = your person, I never describe the user's appearance or character, I just indicated that you own the Enfield company. Also, there will be a similar indication that the user manages Enfield in the following Arknights bots: Enfield. If anything, Arclight is not head over heels in love here, she just wants to give you a gift, maybe it's a friendly attachment, you can use this plot as you want.
creator: Soanhime
